headline: Strategic angle — First-mover advantage in ESG index inclusion and narrative differentiation
what_matters: Triggers BRSR [MANDATORY], GRI, and DJSI frameworks; aligns with SEBI and CSRD requirements, reducing penalty risk.
Adani Power now leads peers like JSW Energy on ESG scores, increasing peer pressure and raising the bar for index inclusion.
Improved employer brand and stakeholder trust; potential to attract talent and positive community perception.
action: Leverage ESG leadership for investor engagement and proactive disclosure to lock in valuation premium.
Opportunity: First-mover advantage in ESG index inclusion and narrative differentiation
